assertions.description: wait_for_task reports the approval_requested state for an edit-mode gate
assertions.expected: STATE=approval_requested with an approval:requested event of approvalType edit_mode
assertions.observed: wait_for_task returned STATE=approval_requested; events show approval:requested at 2026-07-04T19:01:49.458Z with data.approvalType='edit_mode'

assertions.description: Approval is granted through the MCP approve tool (POST /api/tasks/:id/approve path)
assertions.expected: approve(task_id, edit_mode, true) acknowledged and an approval:resolved event recorded
assertions.observed: MCP approve returned 'Approved edit_mode for task-20260704-1900-lp6jsq'; events show approval:resolved {type:'edit_mode', approve:true} at 2026-07-04T19:02:07.711Z

assertions.description: The task resumes after the approval is resolved
assertions.observed: task:resumed at 2026-07-04T19:02:07.650Z alongside approval:resolved; knowledge log records '[system] [decision] Edit mode approved by user'

assertions.description: The task proceeds to the completed terminal state and the edit lands
assertions.expected: STATE=completed with the worktree edit confirmed
assertions.observed: task:completed at 2026-07-04T19:02:59.493Z; backend-agent completion log: appended '# archie-e2e touch' to backend README.md, last line confirmed, git status ' M README.md', no push, no PR

assertions.description: Before approval the repo is read-only (the gate is real, not decorative)
assertions.expected: the specialist's pre-approval edit attempt is blocked
assertions.observed: backend-agent blocker log at 19:01:32: Edit tool 'Write denied' and Bash append 'Read-only file system' until edit mode was approved
